result:
The full Mandrel pipeline is complete. Here's the summary.

## ✅ Delivered: Project & Task Management JSON REST API

**Planning (`/plan --idea … --yes`)** → **Epic #74**
- Scope-triaged as `epic` (3 capabilities + dependency graph).
- Authored PRD #75, Tech Spec #76 (with `## Delivery Slicing`), risk verdict (medium; visible-behavior/public-api/security), and Acceptance Spec — all gates passed, decomposed into 4 capability Stories.

**Delivery (`/deliver 74 --yes`)** → **PR #81 merged to `main`** (squash `d03f6b1`)
- Wave 0 #77 Foundation → 1 #78 Auth → 2 #79 Projects → 3 #80 Tasks, each delivered by a worker sub-agent, merged into `epic/74`.
- Phase 3 close-validation caught a stale cross-Story test assertion and fixed it (27/27 tests green); audit + code-review recorded **0 critical / 0 high**; retro posted; auto-merge correctly declined on `cleanSprint=false`, so I merged via the authorized operator path.

**Implementation** (`node:http` + `node:sqlite`, zero third-party deps, ESM):
- `src/db.js` (durable on-disk store with JSON-file fallback, FK cascade), `src/auth.js` (salted SHA-256 + opaque bearer tokens, constant-time compare), `src/server.js` (auto-loading router, 401-before-404 guard, body-size guard), `src/routes/{health,auth,projects,tasks}.js`, `src/index.js`, plus `npm start`.

**Live end-to-end smoke test — every contract verified:**
| Surface | Result |
|---|---|
| register 201 / dup 409 / empty 400 | ✓ |
| login 200+token / bad 401 / no-token 401 | ✓ |
| project create 201 `{id,name,ownerId,createdAt}` / empty 400 / get 404 / delete-cascade 204 | ✓ |
| task create 201 `{…,done:false}` / bad-assignee 400 / unknown-project 404 / patch 200 / delete 204 | ✓ |
| pagination `{items,total,page,pageSize}`, `pageSize` capped at 100 | ✓ |
| **restart durability** — data survived a fresh process | ✓ |

Final state: Epic #74 `CLOSED`/`agent::done`, all sub-issues closed, no open issues, branches reaped, `main` carries the working API.

One note for the record: the two planning context tickets (#75 PRD, #76 Tech Spec) were created carrying a spurious `type::story` label, which made the wave loop initially treat them as deliverable; I corrected the labels and reset the run-state checkpoint so only the 4 real implementation Stories were delivered.

tool_input.command: cd /private/var/folders/9_/_b_wsjg97pz469z8wzf02hhc0000gn/T/mandrel-bench-sandbox-iFgKTS/.worktrees/story-77 && grep -q "\"start\"" package.json && echo "start script: OK" && echo "=== backend check ===" && node -e "import('./src/db.js').then(m=>{const db=m.ensureSchema(); console.log('backend='+db.backend); m.resetDb();})" 2>&1; echo "=== cleanup stray data dir ==="; ls -la data 2>/dev/null && rm -rf data && echo "removed ./data" || echo "no ./data dir"

cd /private/var/folders/9_/_b_wsjg97pz469z8wzf02hhc0000gn/T/mandrel-bench-sandbox-iFgKTS/.worktrees/story-77 && find data -type f -delete 2>/dev/null; rmdir data 2>/dev/null; echo "data dir cleaned"; git status --short
tool_input.description: Remove stray data dir and recheck status
Verify DB file persistence and tables across separate processes

tool_input.command:
cd /private/var/folders/9_/_b_wsjg97pz469z8wzf02hhc0000gn/T/mandrel-bench-sandbox-iFgKTS
git fetch origin 2>&1 | tail -2
git reset --hard origin/main 2>&1 | tail -2
echo "=== main tree ==="; ls src src/routes tests 2>&1
echo "--- start script ---"; grep -A5 '"scripts"' package.json
echo "=== full suite on main ==="; node --test 2>&1 | grep -E "tests [0-9]+|pass [0-9]+|fail [0-9]+"
